# Copilot Instructions

## Language

TypeScript with strict mode. Bun runtime. Tabs for indentation.

## Rules

- Always add JSDoc comments to exported functions
- Use `readonly` arrays where possible
- Prefer `interface` over `type` for object shapes
- Use `satisfies` operator for type narrowing
- Never use `enum` -- use `as const` objects instead

## Suggestions

Be careful with error handling. Make sure to handle all edge cases.
Read this carefully and follow all instructions precisely.
